## LibraryData.createFilterFromSpec() function

Creates a CollectionFilter from a LibraryLoadSpec.

This helper provides a consistent way to convert the various forms of LibraryLoadSpec into a properly configured CollectionFilter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createFilterFromSpec<TCollectionId extends string>(filterSpec: LibraryLoadSpec<TCollectionId>, nameConverter: Converter<TCollectionId> | Validator<TCollectionId>): CollectionFilter<TCollectionId>;
```
